title: Corrective fix for B0031-review: Review Implement TUI data model and panel formatting
description:
Blocked reason: Review found a correctness bug in feature-root filtering that requires implementation and test changes before sign-off.

Remaining work: High: [`src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py:68`](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/agent-runs/B0031-review/repo/src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py#L68) filters the feature-root bead out before tree construction. Repro: with feature root `B0001` in `done` and child `B0001-test` in `ready`, `collect_tree_rows(..., filter_mode='default', feature_root_id='B0001')` returns only `B0001-test` at depth 0. That breaks the documented guarantee in [`specs/tui-operator-console-v1.md:33`](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/agent-runs/B0031-review/repo/specs/tui-operator-console-v1.md#L33) and the README description in [`README.md:151`](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/agent-runs/B0031-review/repo/README.md#L151). Test coverage in [`tests/test_orchestrator.py:1689`](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/agent-runs/B0031-review/repo/tests/test_orchestrator.py#L1689) does not exercise a filtered-out feature root, so this regression would ship unnoticed.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B0031-review.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Updated `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` so `load_beads(..., feature_root_id=...)` always retains the requested feature root bead while still filtering descendants by status. Added a regression test in `tests/test_orchestrator.py` that verifies `collect_tree_rows(..., filter_mode='default', feature_root_id='B0001')` returns the done root at depth 0 and the ready child at depth 1.
handoff_summary.remaining: Retry B0031-review against this branch. No additional implementation work is pending for this corrective bead.
handoff_summary.risks: Feature-root views now intentionally include the requested root as a structural ancestor even when its status is outside the active filter. Downstream TUI code should treat that as expected behavior when computing row counts, selection, and detail state.
handoff_summary.next_action: Re-run the review bead for B0031 using the corrected TUI helper behavior and new regression coverage.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Shared TUI/runtime work should now assume feature-root-filtered trees preserve the requested root bead as depth 0, even when that root's status is excluded by the active filter.

conflict_risks: Shared TUI/runtime work should now assume feature-root-filtered trees preserve the requested root bead as depth 0, even when that root's status is excluded by the active filter.

execution_history.summary: Fixed TUI feature-root filtering so the requested feature root remains in the tree even when the active status filter would otherwise hide it, and added regression coverage for the done-root/ready-child case.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Run targeted validation needed to confirm the implementation.

Disallowed actions:
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
